text_excerpt: Campaigns and Surveys - Newton Abbot Liberal Democrats Skip to main content Newton Abbot Liberal Democrats Martin Wrigley MP Campaigns and Surveys In Your Area Volunteer What we stand for News Donate Join Donate Join Martin Wrigley MP Parliamentary and Media Appearances Campaigns and Surveys Fair Fares for South Devon Bus Services Health Survey Dawlish Rail Dawlish 20Mph limit Devon Road Repair petition Save Teignmouth Hospital In Your Area County Councillors District Councillors Town Councillors The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU. Website by Prater Raines . This website uses cookies Please select the types of cookies you want to allow. Essential These are necessary for the website to function properly. Analytics These help us to understand how our visitors use our website. Marketing These allow us to display content from other websites that track you for advertising purposes.
